primary_source: Mayer, M. G. (1949). On Closed Shells in Nuclei. Physical Review, 75(12), 1969-1970. DOI: 10.1103/PhysRev.75.1969.
note: a=2 is the smallest magic number. b+2e=2 with b>=1, e>=1 requires b=2-2e; for e=1 gives b=0 (invalid). No valid (b,e) pairs exist. The magic number 2 is outside the QA mod-9 route framework entirely.
